# Reference DT — LineageOS whyred (not a live device dump)

Fetched from `LineageOS/android_kernel_xiaomi_sdm660` (`lineage-20` vendor DTS).

```bash
./scripts/fetch-stock-ref.sh
```

Human summary of what was merged into hybrid DT: **[docs/STOCK_AUDIT.md](../../../../docs/STOCK_AUDIT.md)**

Still preferred for final numbers: extract **your** `boot.img` DTB and run `compare-stock-dt.sh`.
